_doc: Governance-review ledger (audit M-06 / roadmap R5-02). One entry per review; each review adjudicates every rule in spec/hard-rules.json against the telemetry window and stamps last_demote_review. Session counts are the recorded proxy for L2+ task volume (no mechanical L2+ counter exists).

reviews.method: node scripts/rules.js --days=30 on live telemetry, plus semantic review of rule text for self-enforced rules; conformance-eval captures cited where they cover a rule behavior.

entries.evidence: 23 enforcement hits / 13 eligible / 13 evaluated sessions in the 30d window — earning residence.
